visual_description: A man in a white shirt and tie stands with hands on hips near a table where four seated men in uniforms or business attire are gathered, some writing on papers. A television screen to the left displays a moving image, and the room features glass partitions and office furniture under artificial lighting. The standing man faces the seated group, while one seated man looks toward the TV screen.
audio_description: The audio features a male speaker with a clear, neutral tone and moderate pace, speaking in Mandarin.
